intro: The cave wall ahead glitters with raw ore and veins of gemstone. Loose rock skitters somewhere in the dark, and the ground trembles faintly underfoot.
title: Glittering Vein
description: A gem-rich seam in the cave wall. Chip away round by round for a growing haul, plain ore giving way to fine gems and, deep in, a real treasure, but every strike you make raises the chance you wake something territorial or bring the ceiling down. Bank early to keep the safe haul, or press your luck for more.

1.label: Work the vein
1.tooltip:
(+) Chip out a haul round by round
(?) Each strike raises the chance of an ambush
1.selected: You set your pick to the rock and start chipping away...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You leave the vein untouched and move on.

minePrompt: You have hauled out {{oreCount}} finds{{jackpotNote}}. The rumbling is getting louder. Keep digging, or pack up and leave?

push.label: Keep digging
push.tooltip:
(+) Add to your haul, finer finds the deeper you go
(?) Higher chance of a cave-in or an ambush

bank.label: Pack up and leave
bank.tooltip: (+) Keep everything you have dug out

foundOre: You pry loose another chunk of ore and pocket the money it fetches.
foundJackpot: Wedged deep in the seam, a glittering treasure comes free in your hand!
caveInAmbush: The rumbling becomes a roar! A territorial guardian heaves out of the wall - the money you have earned is safely in your bag. Drive it off and you can keep mining!
